description: WorkloadReference references the Workload object together with the template that was used to create a particular PodGroup.

templateName.description: templateName is the name of a template within the Workload object that was used to create a pod group. It must be a DNS label. This field is required.

workloadName.description: workloadName is the name of the Workload object that contains a template that was used when creating a pod group. It must be a DNS name. This field is required.
